ddls:
CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "certificate_description" TEXT /* Description of the certificate */,
  "pin" TEXT /* Password to protect the certificate */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Position of the certificate in an indexed collection */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate authority (CA) that issued the certificate */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Subject (entity) for which the certificate is issued */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Start date of the certificate's validity */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* End date of the certificate's validity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the certificate (e.g., active, expired, revoked) */,
  "certificate_type" TEXT /* Type of certificate (e.g., SSL/TLS, code signing) */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the certificate */,
  "private_key_password" TEXT /* Password to protect the private key associated with the certificate */,
  "certificate_chain" TEXT /* JSON array of intermediate certificates in the chain */,
  "certificate_pem" TEXT /* PEM format of the certificate */,
  "private_key_pem" TEXT /* PEM format of the private key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the certificate was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the certificate was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificate_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "certificate_id" TEXT /* ID of the certificate the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_tags_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificate_lifecycle" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle event */,
  "certificate_id" TEXT /* ID of the certificate the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of lifecycle event (e.g., issuance, renewal, revocation) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the lifecycle event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lifecycle event */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the lifecycle event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lifecycle event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lifecycle event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_lifecycle_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_lifecycle_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificate_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "certificate_id" TEXT /* ID of the certificate that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the certificate */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the certificate was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_access_certificate_id FOREIGN KEY ("certificate_id") REFERENCES certificates ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificate_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
